description_long: This object is a pair of over-ear headphones with a prominent headband and large, round ear cups. The headband is brown and padded, with visible stitching, and is supported by a blue vertical stand that keeps the headphones upright. The ear cups are dark brown with metallic accents and have a slightly worn, vintage appearance. The word 'SONY' is printed in red on the side of the blue stand, indicating the brand. The headphones are connected by a visible metal frame and have black cushioning on the inside of the ear cups. The stand sits on a blue, textured base that mimics a splash or shadow effect.
description: A pair of vintage over-ear headphones with a brown padded headband, large round ear cups, and a blue stand marked 'SONY'. The headphones rest on a blue, textured base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the headphones on the blue stand, with 'SONY' clearly visible on the side.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the round ear cup and the metal frame connecting the headband, with the brand label on the headband visible.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the headphones and the blue stand, with the headband arching over the top.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the other ear cup and the structure of the headband and stand.
